_comment: VS Code context menu installer/uninstaller. The 'registryPaths' values per edition form the STRICT path allow-list used by uninstall.ps1 -- only these exact keys are deleted, never their siblings.
_scopeComment: Default scope when -Scope is omitted. 'Auto' picks AllUsers (HKLM via HKCR) when running elevated, else CurrentUser (HKCU\Software\Classes). Override per-call with -Scope CurrentUser|AllUsers.

repair._comment: Allow-list for the 'repair' verb. Repair only deletes named child keys that EXACTLY match one of these names under HKCR\*\shell, HKCR\Directory\shell, and HKCR\Directory\Background\shell. Add/remove names here to tune cleanup -- never enumerates siblings outside this list.
repair._enforceComment: When true (default), the 'check' command and the test harness (Cases 6/7/8) FAIL if the repair invariants are violated: file-target key still present, suppression values present on directory/background, or any legacy duplicate child key present. Set to false to opt out (e.g. on a machine where the file-target entry is intentionally kept).

confirmBeforeLaunch._comment: Optional: route every leaf through scripts/shared/confirm-launch.ps1 (Invoke-ConfirmedCommand variant -- same countdown / Ctrl+C / any-key behavior script 53 uses). When 'enabled' is true the install writer wraps each commandTemplates.<target> with a pwsh launcher that runs the countdown then dispatches the original VS Code command unchanged via cmd.exe /c. Set 'enabled': false (default) to keep direct-launch behavior.
